data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for certified mail and return receipt options.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Certified mail and return receipt options' as outlined in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this feature. The linked use case mentions this requirement but does not provide any supporting evidence or endpoints that demonstrate its implementation, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of certified mail and return receipt options.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the certified mail and return receipt options.
